series_metadata.series_description: Documents the results of periodic audits on the financial activities of state agencies and local governments, including courts, institutions, colleges and universities, and political subdivisions. Audits are conducted by the Auditor of Public Accounts and by independent certified public accountants.

retention_rules.disposition_method: Transfer To Archives, Library Of Virginia For Permanent Retention

series_metadata.series_description: Documents the audit proceedings and provides analysis and substantiation for the Audit Reports.

retention_rules.disposition_method: Transfer To Staterecords Center, Library Of Virginia

series_metadata.series_title: Comparative Report of Local Government Revenues and Expenditures
series_metadata.series_description: Documents the results of a statistical comparative survey based on annual audits of local governments, as reported to the General Assembly. Includes information on revenues and expenditures.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: five copies permanently in agency. one copy Archives, Library of Virginia. Send 20 copies State Documents Receiving, Library of Virginia, per Code of Virginia, § 2.1-467.2

series_metadata.series_title: Comparative Report of Local Government Revenues and Expenditures - Work Papers
series_metadata.series_description: Documents the substantiation of a statistical comparative survey based on annual audits of local governments, as reported to the General Assembly. Includes information on revenues and expenditures.
